name: Grade 7 Geography — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 7 pathway for global regions, spatial data, human-environment systems, and geographic inquiry. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 7 knowledge and transferable skills in global regions, spatial data, human-environment systems, and geographic inquiry.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: global regions, spatial data, human-environment systems, and geographic inquiry
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about global regions, spatial data, human-environment systems, and geographic inquiry and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
